title: Vushtrri, Mitrovica — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Vushtrri, Mitrovica: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Vushtrri is a city in Mitrovica with a population of 27,000. A historic city in northeastern Kosovo known for its medieval Vushtrri Castle, the Stone Bridge, and its agricultural and forestry industries.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
